reviews.review_description: Perfectly scratches that Lemmings itch. Controls are perfectly implemented. Clever level design. Fun graphics and animations. And the mixed reality mode on Quest 3 was a nice bonus.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, we are very happy that you are enjoying our game :)

reviews.review_description: If you are a fan of Lemmings this game is for you. Cute graphics and intuitive controls

developer_response.body: Thanks for reviewing, and being compared to Lemmings is an honor, since it obviously is a big inspiration for our game :)

reviews.review_title: Enjoyed Lemmings? This is not for you.
reviews.review_description:
TL/DR: buggy Lemmings for babies.

Long version:
One level is like the other. After 10 levels, there is still zero challenge. Here's a hole, put a platform in it. Here's a drop, put a platform underneath, so the spuds don't die. Rinse, repeat...
Did I say 'zero challenge'? Well, there is one: when the game teaches you it has buggy mechanics that you must work with. Spuds don't drop, they jump. So far so good. You think, this would give you enough time to put a platform under it? Wrong. Once the jump animation started, the spud just drops through the platform. This is a bug! This should not be part of the game mechanics.

developer_response.body: Hey thanks for the feedback. You're one of the first to bring up having an issue with this mechanic. After jumping and then "freefalling" the spuds can be caught by the platform, so i'm wondering if this is really a bug and not working as intended or if its the mechanic itself you dislike. Either way if you're willing to elaborate more we'd love the additional feedback!

reviews.review_title: Very cute.  But not my thing.
reviews.review_description:
I was looking for a fun puzzle game but was convinced Kartoffl was not it by the sixth round.

The authors seem to think giving you too few pieces to complete a puzzle is somehow clever.    So the game requires a considerable amount of speed and dexterity to frantically reuse/reposition puzzle pieces while the cute little spuds cheerfully bounce to their goals.   The "apparent motion" experienced in relocating/repositioning the puzzle pieces in haste is very uncomfortable for me.

The game is well written and visually appealing.  The controls are smooth and responsive. And the "spuds" are undeniably cute.   I am sure this game will appeal to many but not my cup of tea.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! We can accept that our game will never be everyone's cup of tea 🍵. I'm glad we can all agree how cute the spuds are though.

reviews.review_description: The game is visually appealing and the music is relaxing. The goal is to get your cute little potatoes from one end of the puzzle to the other. It is very easy to pick up and play since the developers made the level progression intuitive. Haven't beat the game yet but I do see how much the later levels ramp up in difficulty and I'm looking forward to it.

developer_response.body: Glad your liking it Kaveman! The spuds do get more challenging to save in later levels :P. Good luck!

reviews.review_description: Do you like puzzles that are actually hard and do you like an good designed game, THAN THIS IS THE GAME FOR YOU. I have so much fun when i play this and its actually getting harder and harder on each level!!! So this game keeps you busy and takes time to complete. You have to be creative and use your brain. And don’t get me started on the design BECAUSE ITS AMAZING. The little monsters are so cute and the sound is amazing. If you read this buy it its worth your money but im not forcing you. If i could give it more than 5 stars it would be unlimited. :) THIS IS A MUST BUY AND IT EVEN HAS SEETROUGH

developer_response.body: This is the BEST REVIEW EVER

reviews.review_title: Great game but some features missing
reviews.review_description:
It is a great game and for the whole family to enjoy. In another comment I found the notes that the game is getting too big and the construction part which I totally agree with. 
If you are a total beginner it would be nice to have as well a demo mode for the controls and not only the written explanations- this helps with an easier start.
Something to think about for hopefully updates of game.
I hope this comments help in the further development.

developer_response.body: Hey thanks for the feedback! The comments definitely help. New player onboarding is always something we can look to improve. 🙏

reviews.review_description: Yeah, big Lemmings vibes from this. Mixed reality makes this so much more immersive. Great graphics, music, and sound. Controls are very intuitive. It's great fun. The learning curve is fair too and I'm 53! Recommended.

developer_response.body: Glad you liked it! Lemmings was a huge inspiration for us :)

reviews.review_description:
Dear developers, !!! most important feature which is missing:!!!! 
!!! please give us the option to leave all manually placed items on their position after a failed attempt, otherwise you need to rebuild everything from scratch which is super annoying!!!

Further improvement ideas: Rescaling the whole scene would be helpful too (Demeo style) if levels get huge - that way the play space would always fit nicely in your apartment.

Awesome game in general

developer_response.body:
Hey Sebastian thanks for the review! Leaving placed items would indeed be convenient but it would only work for the first few puzzles in the game. Many of the game's puzzles rely on reusing the same items, so it would require a hefty redesign to make that change. 

As for the Demeo style scaling recommendation, that's a fantastic idea!

reviews.review_description: Fun to watch the little potatoes run around. Not a long game, but was only $5 at time of purchase, so a decent value at that price point.

developer_response.body: Watching the spuds run around never gets old. 😌

reviews.review_description:
This is a great modern take on lemmings. Nice looking, solid mechanics, works great in MR. 
For the price, this is a bargain.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kudos The_Richelieu! 💫🥔Much appreciated! - holiday greetings from the team!

reviews.review_description:
Everyone who knows "Lemmings" should bei familiar with the gameplay concept, everyone who doesnt know it: you need to Guide Auto Walking NPCs in The correct direction so they reach The Goal instead of dying.

The First 15-20 Levels are pretty easy and build Like a Tutorial so you can familiarize with the different Objects and gameplay mechanics but after Level 20 you are up to some pretty challenging Puzzles (at least If you want to reach 3 Stars in every Level) which do not only Challenge your brain but also your reactions as you need to alter The path of your Spuds while they are Walking.

If i do Not mistake The Menu it seems Like there are 60 Levels to Beat with increasing difficulty, which is a good amount of Content for this Type of Game.

The Graphics are Basic but very pretty and The Animations are lovely and funny, also The Music/Sound Matches the Game pretty Well and have a Catch to it.

I want to mention that i won this Game via The Facebook group "Meta Quest VR Family" which Had No influence on my Review!

I want to thank the Developer for Providing The Key and Hope to See more games in The Future :)

developer_response.body: Congrats on winning, and happy to hear you are enjoying our game!

reviews.review_description: I absolutely loved the demo version and was waiting for the full version to be released for a while now! Super happy for the devs that the full version made it out of app lab and to the main store for launch. It’s well deserved!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words, that means a lot to us!

reviews.review_description: Game is great fun and I love the feel of it. Nice graphics and sounds. Stars out easy but gets more challenging.

developer_response.body: That's great to hear! It does indeed ramp up...only the boldest and bravest spudherders make it all the way to level 60!

reviews.review_description: I'm enjoying this SO much more than the monetized abomination in the Play store.  And OMD, I can't believe how cute the dancing spud on the scoreboard is!  I spend entirely too much time "poking" the little tater just to get the cute little squeak.

developer_response.body: That's great to hear, Gadgetskopf. All those dance class lessons were worth it after all!

reviews.review_description: This is so lovely! Cute (*’(OO)’*)

developer_response.body: Hehe Thank you 🥹

reviews.review_description: Love it!

developer_response.body: So do we! 😌 Thanks for the review 🙏

reviews.review_title: A nice game for in between
reviews.review_description:
When I went to the full directory of games sorted by rating, I found this little gem almost on top of the list. The difficulty of the levels is gradually increasing and it's so much fun guiding the little guys through the levels. It's different from Lemmings and the like as sometimes you have the move the tiles while spuds run. I assume there are like 60 levels which will take me some time to reach as now I'm somewhere in the 20ies where the 3 star ratings are not easy to achieve. Overall, a nice game for the times in between.

Go to ocuyou on the link tree to get this one and some others with a rebate.

developer_response.body: The 3 star ratings are not easy to achieve but that just makes it even more worth it when you 3 star every level!🌟🌠✨ Thanks for the review! 🙏

reviews.review_description: The game is perfect for kids! Simple, cute and friendly. It starts easy and you can learn to handle the game step by step.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing and the kind words!

reviews.review_description:
You responded to my demo review finally, informing me that I could finally buy the full game, but I had already beat you to it. I had kartoffl’s release date set in my calendar since it was announced.  I threw my money at you as fast as I possibly could! Literally within the 1st minute of its release Lol It’s perfect so far! So worth the wait. Buy it people. It’s worth $30 honestly. $15 is a steal

UPDATE: Now that I’ve had some more time to play, im really loving the controls. They seem much simpler than in the demo, which was my only small complaint. I’ve completed the first 20 levels and so far it’s a blast. Polished, zero bugs, this game is LEGIT. Think Lemmings, only much better

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for reviewing, and playing our game. Honored to be compared to Lemmings, one of our all time favourite games.
